calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-13-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Brent Kato for Carol Farias (Executor).

Ther Court addressed the issue with the request for extraordinary fees. Mr. Kato stated that they are seeking extraordinary fees for the sale of the real property, that his client is also handling the adminstration of the brothers' estates, and that his client had to collect assets to bring into the estate. The Court stated that they were joint tenant accounts. Mr. Kato stated that they still had to prove the death in order to get it into her estate. Brief discussions were held. At the conclusion of discussions, Mr. Kato stated that he did not have any calculations with him. The Court asked for a best estimate cost. Mr. Kato responded that it was half of the requested amount. The Court then took the matter under submission.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy K. Chan. Matter not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
